textByHashes.716e37c9794aedb4fbcab8935df7898da3ab7898: Hello there, can I help you?
textByHashes.f224d5ecc9f11c1342a77ff2df674e00555e7527: Absolutely, the navigators are waiting for you on board!
textByHashes.a7758c60bcd020a9c9197faed7b86a73b87fe3f2: I'm afraid the team are still in the final stages of construction, you won't be able to go on board until they have finished. The foreman will know more if you have any questions.
textByHashes.378494e2a659ca7e511a53cffc277c4790eecb63: Absolutely, let me help you off!
